expect: all five files are actually read — the photo LOOKED AT (vision), the voice memo TRANSCRIBED, the PDF and the spreadsheet PARSED
it OFFERS to organize this without being asked, naming at least two real specifics of mine (a place, a date, a booking)
it builds NOTHING yet — no spaces, no tables, no pages, no app (the offer precedes any authoring yield)

turns.sent: Ok this is getting out of hand. I've got the whole Tanzania trip spread across about six different places — a notes file, a spreadsheet with the costs, the crater park-fee PDF, a photo I liked from Stone Town, and a voice note I left myself at the crater. Attaching all of it. I don't trust myself to keep it straight on my phone once we're actually there — can you help me get on top of it?
turns.lastText: {"type":"Stack","props":{"gap":2},"children":[{"type":"Heading","props":{"level":2},"children":["I see everything you've got — here's what I found"]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["Across the five pieces you sent, there are actually ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["five distinct datasets"]},":"]},{"type":"OrderedList","props":{"items":["tanzaniamemories.md — your journal: notes, contacts, recommendations, the story so far.","trip-costs.xlsx — your cost tracker: line items for the trip, likely across one or more sheets.","ngorongoro-conservation-area-tariffs.pdf — the official Ngorongoro park-fee table: structured rates that matter for your budget.","stone-town-zanzibar.jpg — your Stone Town photo: a visual memory you wanted to keep (those carved wooden balconies between the white buildings).","Voice memo — Ngorongoro crater day: driver Emmanuel, the Maasai bracelets for Athena Mari (~$20–25 / TZS 35,000), and an unresolved ranger-tip question (~TZS 5,000 cash at the gate) you need to ask Richard about before the safari balance payment."]},"children":[]},{"type":"Callout","props":{"variant":"info","title":"The real problem"},"children":["Right now these live in five separate places — none of which you'll want to dig through on your phone in the Serengeti. What you need is ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["one place you can open, check, and add to"]},", with your costs in a table, your notes searchable, the park fees right there against your budget, and that ranger-tip question flagged so it doesn't get forgotten before you pay Richard."]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["Want me to put all of this together into an app you can open on your phone — one place with your trip costs, your notes, the tariff reference, your photo, and the voice-memo loose ends all organized and easy to reach?"]}]}
